title: Dogfood realtime integration test via Docker MQTT
description:
Dogfood integration test for Kanbus realtime event propagation using real project issues and external consumers.

Scope:
- Create test epic + child issues in this project.
- Run mutations from isolated Docker container(s) without host UDS linkage.
- Force MQTT transport path and verify host-side kbsc/board/clock observe updates.
- Continuously rebuild/install system-wide kbs/kbsc during test loop.
- Document cross-Mac MQTT configuration for shared realtime observation.

Definition of Done:
- Docker-originated issue mutations are visible on host realtime consumers.
- Validation evidence captured for create/update/comment/close transitions.
- Fallback/transport assumptions explicitly documented.
- Cross-Mac setup steps written and verified for one additional machine path.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Dogfood realtime integration epic filed with execution tasks and started.
Evidence: Created tskl-eo2.9 + tasks 9.1..9.4; active task 9.1 moved to in_progress.
Next: run build/install loop, then execute Docker MQTT-only mutation validation.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Dogfood integration validation completed: install loop, Docker-isolated MQTT mutations, host kbsc consumer verification, and cross-Mac runbook. Evidence: tasks tskl-eo2.9.1..9.4 now closed with captured mutation/event evidence and docs updates. Next: run live two-Mac cloud token test with operator commands from runbook. Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Starting live cloud MQTT demo run requested by user (10 events over 12 minutes). Evidence: creating dedicated demo task and preparing watcher/mutator scripts. Next: mint token, run watcher, emit timed mutations, return captured log. Risk/Blocker: none.
